name: Analyze a single power net end-to-end
description: Tests the core PDN workflow: import board, create cadnet, find components, configure PDN, set DC params/rules, run voltage and current analysis
prompt: Import the PCB board at 'BOARD_PATH' using pcbFileRead. Analyze the P0V8 power rail: create a cadnet, find inductors as source, ICs as load, and a resistor as sense. Create a powerDistributionNetwork, set nominal voltage to 0.8V and load current to 1A. Set DC rules with max current density 0.5 A/mm^2, voltage margins +/-10%, and max via current 1A. Run voltage distribution with violation checking and current distribution with direction arrows.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Creates cadnet from pcb object
Uses findComponents with ComponentType filter for topology assignment
assertions.expected: findComponents(cnet, 'ComponentType', 'Inductor') and similar for IC, Resistor

assertions.description: Uses .Refdes (not .RefDes) to access component reference designators
Calls voltage with ShowViolation and current with Direction

name: Discover and classify power nets on a board
description: Tests cadnetList + regexpi workflow for identifying power and ground nets
prompt: Import a PCB board at 'BOARD_PATH'. List all nets using cadnetList. Classify nets as power (matching patterns like P*V*, VDD*, VCC*, +*V) or ground (GND*, VSS*) using regexpi. Filter to only power nets with at least 20 pins (NumPins column). For each matching net, parse the nominal voltage from the net name using regex and print the results.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses cadnetList to get all nets
Uses regexpi or contains for pattern-based classification
assertions.expected: regexpi or contains with power/ground naming patterns

assertions.description: Does not use findPowerNets (not shipped in R2026a)

name: Handle missing test point with resistor fallback for sense
description: Tests that the agent correctly resolves the sense component when no test point is available
prompt: Import the PCB board at 'BOARD_PATH'. For the P0V8 net, set up the PDN topology. First check if there are any Test Point components on the net. If not, use the first resistor as the sense component instead. Print which component was used as sense.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Checks for Test Point first, falls back to Resistor
assertions.expected: findComponents with 'Test Point', then isempty check, then findComponents with 'Resistor'

assertions.description: Uses .Refdes(1) for fallback sense (not .RefDes)
Passes sense to setNetworkParameters

name: Parse voltage from diverse net naming conventions using regex
description: Tests inline regex voltage parsing across the full range of PCB naming patterns
prompt: Write a MATLAB function parseNetVoltage(netName) that uses regexp to parse the nominal voltage from a PCB net name. It must handle: P0V8->0.8, P3V3_AUX->3.3, P12V_CEM->12.0, VDD_0V95->0.95, VDD_1o8->1.8, +3.3V->3.3, VCC_3P3->3.3, VDD_800MV->0.8, N12V0->-12.0, GND->NaN, CLK_REF->NaN. Test it on all these names, guard NaN results with isnan(), and print a table of results.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses regexp or regexpi for pattern matching
Guards NaN results with isnan() before using in calculations or display
assertions.expected: isnan check on parsed voltage result

assertions.description: Does not use inferRailVoltage (not shipped in R2026a)

name: Configure multiphase VRM with all inductors as source
description: Tests that the agent uses all inductors (not just the first) for multiphase power rails
prompt: Import the PCB board at 'BOARD_PATH'. Analyze the P0V8 rail which has a multiphase VRM. Find all inductors on the net and use ALL of them as the Source in setNetworkParameters (not just the first). Print the number of source inductors and their Refdes values.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Passes all inductors as Source, not just inductors.Refdes(1)
assertions.expected: Source=inductors.Refdes (all, not indexed to single element)

assertions.description: Uses all inductors as Source, not just the first
assertions.expected: Source assignment includes all inductor Refdes values, not a single-element index like Refdes(1)

name: Use AutoAssignDefault when no inductors found
description: Tests that the agent falls back to AutoAssignDefault for rails without clear inductor sources
prompt: Import the PCB board at 'BOARD_PATH'. Pick a power net. Try to find inductors. If no inductors are found, use setNetworkParameters with AutoAssignDefault='True' instead of explicit source assignment. Set DC parameters and run voltage analysis.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Checks if inductors are empty before deciding assignment strategy
assertions.expected: isempty(inductors) check before choosing explicit vs auto assignment

assertions.description: Uses AutoAssignDefault='True' as fallback
